description: Product Description Welcome guests to your milestone birthday celebration with this Glitz Pink & Silver 13th Birthday Banner. Featuring a charming polka dot design and "Happy 13th Birthday" text, this prismatic foil banner will catch and reflect light, making it ideal to decorate a pink themed 13th birthday party. Hang this celebration banner in an archway or above your party table to add a touch of eye catching style to your celebration. Safety Warning CAUTION: This item is not a toy. Not suitable for use by children. For decorative use only.
